mapper.select: SELECT c.class_id, c.class_name, NVL(MAX(t.teacher_name), '-') AS teacher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.student_id) AS student_count, c.class_status, c.created_at FROM class c LEFT JOIN teacher_class tc ON c.class_id = tc.class_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tc.teacher_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN student_class sc ON c.class_id = sc.class_id WHERE c.class_status != 'DELETED' GROUP BY c.class_id, c.class_name, c.class_status, c.created_at ORDER BY c.class_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE class SET class_status = #{classStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE class_id = #{classId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASS WHERE CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
